name: io.github.Servosity/connectwise-control-mcp
title: ConnectWise Control MCP
description: Manage ConnectWise Control (ScreenConnect) remote support and access sessions from one CLI or agent.

environmentVariables.name: CONNECTWISE_CONTROL_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Your ScreenConnect instance base URL, e.g. https://company.screenconnect.com (per-instance).

environmentVariables.name: CONNECTWISE_CONTROL_USERNAME
environmentVariables.description: Your ConnectWise Control instance user name (HTTP Basic auth).

environmentVariables.name: CONNECTWISE_CONTROL_PASSWORD
environmentVariables.description: Your ConnectWise Control instance password (HTTP Basic auth).
